title: [ITD] Fuse checkout
description:
WIP-missing few fuses, need to add, 2 IPs left to tested functional, will pass this TC once acheived

Flow *

Basic checkout for ensuring that fused values utilized for the ITD calculation are non-zero.

Expected to be integrated into the ITD pre-test content:

from pm.focus import itd

itd.pre_test(SockNum)


Listo of fuses to review:

Configuration *

No particular requirements for configuration identified.


Pass/Fail criteria *

Each fuse contains a non-zero value, for the voltage cutoff values, an additional condition is to be met where in case of two slopes, "cutoff_x", the point where both slopes intersect, should not be lower than either slope cutoff value. Exception for voltage floor values.


Intent Verification Strategy *

Simics.


HW Requirements

N/A


SW Requirements

Acode, Pcode, Patch23.
